action.reasoning: Observation: Training failed at Qwen2VLForConditionalGeneration.from_pretrained with RuntimeError on mismatched sizes (ckpt weights vs empty shapes, common for VL models with device_map/rotary/vision components). Predict.py incorrectly loads full model class directly on PEFT 'adapter' dir and would fail. Dataset uses str path for images (works but inconsistent), SFTTrainer has conflicting pre-get_peft_model + peft_config. Analysis: Adding ignore_mismatched_sizes=True bypasses load error; remove manual get_peft_model so SFTTrainer applies LoRA cleanly; update predict to load base then PeftModel.from_pretrained(adapter); add PIL Image.open for consistency and min/max_pixels; keep small 200-sample 1-epoch baseline per guidelines to validate full pipeline + measure iter time before scaling. Decision: Overwrite train.py/predict.py with fixes, run short training, submit_eval for initial grounding_score.
